titleStmt.title: SII 24.319: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 319. (A.R. No. 53 of 1938-39.) II PRĀKĀRA, SOUTH WALL.

summary.p: Registers a gift of the village Kumārakkuḍi, in Maḻai-nāḍu, a sub-division of Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu, on the north bank in Tiruchchirāppaḷḷi-uśāvaḍi, by the king Vijaya-Bhūpati as a daṇḍikai-jīvita to Uttama-Nambi, a sthānika of the temple. The village is stated to have once been included in the obaḷi for piyādākai-jīvita. The terms daṇḍikai and piyādākai mean palanquin and peon respectively. The date Śubhakṛit, Māgha, śu. Pāḍyamī corresponds to A.D. 1423, January 13, but cannot be verified. The record bears the signature of Siruparasa in Kannaḍa characters.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīḥ . śubhakṛt varuṣam māghaśuddhapāḍyami śrīman mahārājādhirāja rājaparameśvara śrīvīrapratāpa vijayabhūpatirāya mahārāyar śrīraṅgattil sthā nikaril Uttamanampikkuk koṭutta paṭṭaiyam . nammuṭaiya rāyasapramāṇappaṭi §
taṉakkut taṇṭikai jivitattukkuk koṭutta tiruccirāppaḷḷi Ucāvaṭiyil vaṭa karai rājarāja vaḷanāṭṭil maḻai nāṭṭu melai muṟi piyātākai jīvitat tukku naṭanta Opaḷiyil kumārakkuṭi Ūr 1- kku samste ø 3 100 samste
poṉ muṉṉūṟum Inta grāmam nāṉku Ellaikku Uṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉcey vācalmaṉai perkkaṭamai taṟikkaṭamai paḻavari putuvari Uṭpaṭa sakalasvarṇādāyam sakalabhattādāyam Uṭpaṭa cuṅkam Iṭaittu
ṟai cekkuttuṟai Oḻukku miṉ pāṭṭam pulvari mantai mallāyi Avvaiyar makamai Ulakuṭaiya nācciyār makamai viṟpaṇam niṅkalāka Aṣṭabhogam teja svāmyam Uṭpaṭa sarvvamānnyam Āka sarvabādhai parikāramāka Ācandrārkka
sthāyiyākac certtuk koṭutta Aḷavukku sukhattile Anubhavittukkoḷḷa vum .
Digital edition of SII 24.319 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
